description: I build fast, responsive, and user-friendly websites with database integration using Next.js. I also create eye-catching designs such as banners, posters, and creative visuals.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: My personal portfolio built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS.

projects.title: E-commerce Store
projects.description: A full-stack shop app with authentication, cart, and checkout.

projects.title: Graphic Design Showcase
projects.description: A gallery of banners, posters, and creative visuals.

contact_message: I’m always open to discussing new projects, collaborations, or opportunities. Feel free to reach out — I’ll get back to you as soon as I can.
about_description: I am a full-stack web developer with a background in both development and design. I enjoy working across the full web stack — from backend systems that handle data and logic, to frontend interfaces that users interact with directly.
about_intro_text: I’m particularly interested in how systems and user experience connect. On the backend, I focus on building reliable and maintainable structures. On the frontend, I care about clarity, usability, and making interfaces feel intuitive.

Alongside development, I also have experience in graphic design. This helps me think about layout, visual hierarchy, and communication in a more complete way. I value clean design that supports function rather than distracting from it.
I also enjoy working with data and presenting it in a way that is easy to read and understand.
about_philosophy_text: I am currently focusing on modern web development using Next.js, and I am using this portfolio as part of that learning process to improve how I structure and build real-world applications.

I am based in Japan and interested in connecting with other developers and working on collaborative projects. My goal is to continue improving as a developer and contribute to stable, well-structured web products.
